Live bridge invoke unset for torax. Set fusion_projection.json bridges.torax.invoke or MCP_* env.

notes: Catalog: virtual_systems + production_systems in fusion_virtual_systems_catalog_s4.json; M8 benchmarks under deploy/fusion_mesh/config/benchmarks/.

Virtual Metal batches remain S4 compute receipts (tokamak_mode virtual in ledger).
